title: Two AI Power Moves Most People Overlook
description: Most people use AI to work faster. But the highest-leverage moves are about multiplying your team and sharpening your judgment.
globalInfo: Source: Nathan Mapp, CPA — LinkedIn post (2026-02-26).

modules.title: Power Move #1: Multiply Your Team With AI
modules.description: Stop hoarding AI skills — the real leverage is making your whole team 10x

steps.title: The 10x Trap
steps.content: You alone with AI = 10x you + team of 5 at 1x = 15x total. You sharing AI with your team = everyone at 10x = 50x total.

steps.title: How to Do It — A Practical Example
steps.content: Built an AI tool? Ask what other tasks follow the same pattern. Find who does similar work. Schedule 30 min to walk them through it.

modules.title: Power Move #2: Use AI to Challenge You
modules.description: Turn AI confident wrongness into your secret weapon for sharper thinking

steps.title: Why AI Confident Wrongness is Actually Useful
steps.content: AI gets things wrong confidently. That is a feature — you have unlocked a simulator for high-stakes arguments and critical thinking.

steps.title: Method 1: The Two-Window Debate
steps.content: Open Chat A, state your opinion. Ask it to generate a killer prompt arguing against you. Open Chat B, paste the adversarial prompt. Argue your position against it.

steps.title: Method 2: The Honest Friction Prompt
steps.content: Add to your system instructions: State the best-supported truth. Name problems directly. When you see something I do not, say so. Be a source of honest friction, not comfort.
